arabic: اسْتَخْدَمْتُ الْمِتْرُو لِلتَّنَقُّلِ دَاخِلَ الْمَدِينَةِ الْكَبِيرَةِ. اشْتَرَيْتُ بِطَاقَةً مَغْنَاطِيسِيَّةً مِنْ آلَةِ التَّذَاكِرِ. نَظَرْتُ فِي خَرِيطَةِ الْخُطُوطِ وَاخْتَرْتُ الْخَطَّ الصَّحِيحَ. وَصَلَتِ الْقِطَارَةُ بَعْدَ دَقِيقَتَيْنِ وَكَانَتْ مُكْتَظَّةً بِالرُّكَّابِ. نَزَلْتُ فِي الْمَحَطَّةِ الصَّحِيحَةِ وَوَجَدْتُ الطَّرِيقَ بِسُهُولَةٍ.
translation: Koristio sam metro za kretanje unutar velikog grada. Kupio sam magnetnu karticu na automatu za karte. Pogledao sam mapu linija i izabrao pravi pravac. Voz je stigao nakon dvije minute i bio je pun putnika. Sišao sam na pravoj stanici i lako pronašao put.
translationEn: I used the metro to get around the big city. I bought a magnetic card from the ticket machine. I looked at the line map and chose the right direction. The train arrived after two minutes and was packed with passengers. I got off at the right station and found the way easily.
